ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 18 to 34, 65 and older) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background (e.g., Bachelors' degree, High school) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., Rest, Madison) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level for the demographic group */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the demographic group */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the demographic group */,
  "voter_registration_status" TEXT /* Voter registration status of the demographic group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the demographic entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the demographic entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political affiliation entry */,
  "party_response" TEXT /* Political party response (e.g., Dem, Rep) */,
  "approval" TEXT /* Approval of a specific issue or candidate (e.g., Approve, Disapp.) */,
  "genballot" TEXT /* General ballot preference (e.g., Dems. take House, Reps. keep House) */,
  "hdem_fav" TEXT /* Favorability towards Democrats (e.g., Favorable, Unfavorable) */,
  "hrep_fav" TEXT /* Favorability towards Republicans (e.g., Favorable, Unfavorable) */,
  "file_party" TEXT /* Political party as recorded in the file (e.g., Democratic, Republican) */,
  "partyid" TEXT /* Political party identification (e.g., Independent (No party), Republican) */,
  "issue_stance" TEXT /* Stance on key political issues */,
  "campaign_donation_history" TEXT /* History of campaign donations */,
  "campaign_volunteer_history" TEXT /* History of campaign volunteer activities */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the political affiliation entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the political affiliation entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the political affiliation entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the political affiliation entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the survey */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the respondent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the respondent entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the respondent entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
